case_title: LALOR, MARTIN vs. MARTINEZ, EVA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LALOR, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EVA DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EVA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 40 A PORTER, SFCA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LALOR, MARTIN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-16-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

U.D. CASE P/T JUDGE RAYMOND N. ERLACH, RPT. J. CHAN, CLK. R. CONTRERAS 2PM C/C FOR SETTL. CONF. CASE SETTLED. JUDGMNT. FOR PLTF. RESTIT. OF PREMISES: 40 A PORTER ST, SFCA, 94110. STAY OF EXECUTION TIL 12:01 AM ON 9/15/94. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. PLTF. TO WAIVE RENT THRU 9/15/94 PLTF. TO KEEP DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS. IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY, PLTF. WILL DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE.
